name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, budget mismanagement causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated budget tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking procurement budget usage effectively.
features: Manual entry option for budget adjustments
